title: Lead Scoring Analysis
Competitor Pricing Intelligence
prompt_text:
Research and analyze competitor pricing for {{service_type}} in {{market_region}}. Create a competitive pricing matrix showing:

1) Direct competitors and their pricing models
2) Price ranges for {{specific_offering}}
3) Value-add offerings that justify premium pricing
4) Discount/bundling strategies
5) Recommended pricing strategy for our offerings

Provide actionable pricing recommendations based on market analysis.
use_case: Set dynamic pricing and bid competitively

title: Email Campaign Copy Generator
prompt_text:
Write a compelling {{email_type}} email for {{recipient_title}} at {{company_name}}. The email should:

1) Hook: Reference something specific about their company/industry
2) Problem: Identify a pain point in {{industry_vertical}}
3) Solution: Present {{solution}} as the answer
4) Proof: Include {{success_metric}} from similar companies
5) CTA: Clear next step {{call_to_action}}

Tone: {{tone}} | Length: {{word_count}} words | Avoid being salesy.

title: Bid Analysis & Recommendation
Lead Qualification Framework
Content Audit & SEO Recommendations
prompt_text:
Audit the content strategy for {{website_url}} in {{target_market}}. Analyze:

1) Top-performing content (topics, formats, CTAs)
2) SEO gaps in {{industry}} keywords
3) Competitor content benchmarking
4) Recommended content calendar (next 90 days)
5) Content types with highest engagement potential

Provide specific article topics, keywords, and publishing schedule that will drive {{business_objective}}.
use_case: Plan content strategy for lead generation

title: Workflow Automation Design
Customer Journey Mapping
Proposal Win Strategy
Agent Capability Definition
